component.name: Metric Card
component.description: Dashboard metric summary: optional hero metric (Metric-XL, success), optional two-column row (Revenue / Materials style), optional three-column row (Time / NET·HR / Jobs or Sessions). Content and number formatting are instance / code props—not extra Figma variants.

layoutSemantics.Default: Primary + secondary + tertiary; horizontal dividers and vertical rules between columns (subtle border).
layoutSemantics.Default (Clean): Same sections; vertical dividers between columns removed.
layoutSemantics.Secondary only: Two-column row only (tighter vertical padding on card).
layoutSemantics.Tertiary Only: Three-column row; third column label Jobs.
layoutSemantics.Tertiary Only (Job): Three-column row; third column label SESSIONS.

codeProps.cleanLayout: boolean; maps to Default (Clean) — no vertical column dividers.
codeProps.secondary: optional pair: left/right columns with label, value, valuePrefix, tone (primary|brand|success), align.
codeProps.tertiary: optional triple: left/center/right columns; use labels NET/HR and Jobs vs Sessions via props.
codeProps.tones: primary = Foundation/Text/Primary; brand = Brand/Primary; success = Semantic/Status/Success/Text.

notes: 2026-03-28: Figma variant axis renamed from `Property 1` to `Sections` (component set `258:1161`).
Code composes sections via props—Figma variants illustrate layouts; Jobs vs Sessions is a label override, not a separate structural variant in code.
